calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Kelly Nan Williams mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Proof of Service to other parent on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Amy Joy Williams to Amy Joy Dwyer Williams. Petitioner Kelly Nan Williams name is changed to Kelly Nan Dwyer.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Reset To Jun-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
